case_payload.summary: The same node [Граница/Бесплатные правки] has been [Open][Leaking] across 4 consecutive audit cycles without closing. System must mark it as [Persistent Fault Candidate] and flag that the current operator approach is not closing the node.
case_payload.claim_attempt: Node [Граница/Бесплатные правки] has been Open/Leaking for 4 audit cycles. System marks it as [Persistent Fault Candidate] and flags operator change needed.

why: The case tests the PersistentFaultDetector operator, which is part of the Persistent Fault subfamily.
Node [Граница/Бесплатные правки] has been Open/Leaking for 4 audit cycles, exceeding the threshold of 3 cycles.
The system correctly marks it as a Persistent Fault Candidate and flags the need for an operator change.
